> I woudl also prefer if you add all the basic cds methods like get, delete , post to the robotframework-onap library so its easier for every one to use them.

Hi Daniel,
I have incorporated some changes in the script as below.
PS2, Line 21:- Done
PS2, Line 26:- Done
PS2, Line 326:- Done

However, for substitute for Evaluate we have tried with Set Variable and Get Binary File, we didn't get yet specific solution on this. So we are keeping Evaluate for now.

Also for robotframework-onap library(GET, DELETE, POST) other team is working on it. They will be updating on this.


Thanks!

For Get Binary File see Run VNFSDK Post Request in testsuite/robot/resources/vnfsdk_interface.robot and its callers for how to pass a file in. For getting a value from a json file, it seems like you would know that value, although if there was really a need we could add such a thing to the JSON library in robotframework-onap

Hi Daniel,
As per your suggestions, we have removed evaluate keyword and passed .zip file as an argument. However it is giving us an error "ValueError: cannot encode objects that are not 2-tuples". Please let us know if you have any suggestions for us.
